name: GRAVES OPHTHALMOPATHY
definition: THYROID OPHTHALMOPATHY = ENDOCRINE EXOPHTHALMOS autoimmune disease unrelated to thyroid function with an increase in orbital pressure

demographics.Etiology: produced by long-acting thyroid-stimulating factor (LATS); probably immunologic
demographics.Histo: deposition of hygroscopic mucopolysaccharides + glycoprotein (early) + collagen

dominant_finding: high SI in enlarged eye muscles on T2WI (edema in acute inflammation)
